textPlain: love this. it's solving a real problem nobody admits they care about but everyone actually does. picking a climbing gym based on vibe/smell/crowd is way more important than any feature list.the smart move here is crowdsourcing the data early. if you can get 20-30 gyms with real ratings before competitors show up, you own the category. the hard part isn't building the site - it's getting users to contribute data before there's enough data to make it useful. classic chicken-and-egg.maybe seed it by personally visiting gyms and adding initial ratings yourself? even fake ones marked as "staff review" just to have something there. empty databases kill momentum.
Funny and practical to know if the gym stinks.Just my two scents: I find the font incredibly hard to read.
10/10 for the login username placeholder text alone
This might attract a certain type of people
Bouldering at West Cape Howe above several hundred tonnes of rotting seaweed can get pretty stinky.Good views though: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=yLihtxNPB9U
Everyone nose what you did there.
